name: Snyk Agent Scan
description: Security scanner for MCP servers and agent skills. Detects prompt injections, tool poisoning, and sensitive data risks across Claude, Cursor, Windsurf, and 10+ other agents.

skills.name: Scan MCP Servers
skills.description: Auto-discover and scan installed MCP server configurations for prompt injections, tool poisoning, and tool shadowing attacks.

skills.name: Scan Agent Skills
skills.description: Inventory and analyze agent skills across Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor for malware payloads hidden in natural language.

skills.name: Security Report
skills.description: Generate detailed security reports with severity ratings across 15+ distinct risk categories for all installed agent components.
